overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt exploring a dark stone dungeon before emerging into a vast mountainous valley with snow-capped peaks, coniferous forests, and scattered settlements.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark stone dungeon interior with support pillars

agents.ego_description: Geralt navigating through the dark dungeon, walking between stone pillars and arches

entered.detail: thick cylindrical stone pillars supporting the dungeon ceiling
arched stone doorways leading to other dungeon chambers
rough dirt and stone ground surface
narrow vertical windows letting in minimal light

segments.scene_description: Geralt explores a dimly lit stone dungeon characterized by thick support pillars, arched doorways, and rough dirt floors. The environment is enclosed and dark with minimal natural light entering through narrow slit windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase ascending to outdoor exit

events.description: character begins ascending the stone staircase toward the exit
approaching the bright exit archway, strong daylight backlight becomes visible

agents.ego_description: Geralt climbing the stone stairs toward the bright exit, transitioning from darkness to light

entered.detail: worn stone steps leading upward to the surface
large stone archway framing the outdoor exit
thick roots and vines hanging down over the exit opening
rough hewn stone walls lining the stairwell

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a stone staircase within a narrow stairwell, leaving the dungeon behind. Bright daylight streams through an exit archway covered with hanging roots and vines, creating a strong backlight as the surface approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain overlook trail with panoramic valley views

events.description: exits the dungeon into bright outdoor mountain landscape with snow-capped peaks

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the mountain path overlooking the vast valley and snow-capped mountain range

entered.detail: towering snow-covered mountain peaks dominating the horizon
tall evergreen trees scattered across the mountainside
distant village with wooden structures visible in the valley below
cobblestone trail winding along the mountain ridge
simple wooden fences lining parts of the path
green grassy slopes surrounding the stone path

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the dungeon, the scene opens into a breathtaking mountain vista with snow-capped peaks, dense coniferous forests, and a valley settlement below. Geralt walks along a cobblestone path bordered by grass and wooden fences, with the camera following his movement through the bright, open landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the oppressive confines of a dark stone dungeon into a vast, sun-drenched mountain wilderness. It begins within a dimly lit interior of thick support pillars and arched doorways, where minimal light filters through narrow slit windows onto rough dirt floors. As the camera ascends a narrow stone staircase, the enclosed atmosphere shifts toward a bright exit archway draped in hanging roots and vines. The scene then opens abruptly into a breathtaking vista of snow-capped peaks and dense coniferous forests, with the lighting transitioning from subterranean gloom to brilliant daylight. Finally, the camera follows Geralt as he walks along a cobblestone path bordered by grass and wooden fences, overlooking a distant valley settlement.
